MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"includeAll" to booleanProperty("When true, return every item in the session instead of only SENT and unfinished items. Defaults to false.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"includeScreenshot" to booleanProperty("Whether to include the latest screenshot resource URI when available.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"includeSemantics" to booleanProperty("Whether the caller wants semantics data. V1 bridge inspection returns semantics nodes.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"maxNodes" to integerProperty("Maximum nodes requested by the caller. V1 bridge may return fewer or ignore this hint.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"newSession" to booleanProperty("Create a new session instead of resuming the current or latest persisted session.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$"packageName" to stringProperty("Android application id. If omitted, .fixthis/project.json or server --package is used.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$FixThisBridge$suspend fun performNavigation(packageName: String, request: FeedbackNavigationRequest): JsonObject
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$FixThisTools$private suspend fun bridgeResource(uri: String, block: suspend () -> JsonObject): JsonObject
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$ResourceDefinition("fixthis://screenshot/latest/crop.png", "Latest crop screenshot", "Desktop-readable latest crop screenshot artifact path.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$ResourceDefinition("fixthis://screenshot/latest/full.png", "Latest full screenshot", "Desktop-readable latest full screenshot artifact path.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$ResourceDefinition("fixthis://session/current", "Current FixThis session", "Current bridge session and sidekick status.")
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$ResourceDefinition("fixthis://source-index", "FixThis source index", "Source index availability reported by the sidekick bridge.")

MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "List feedback queue summaries for the active FixThis feedback session. By default the items array contains only SENT feedback that is not resolved or wont_fix; pass includeAll=true to include drafts and finished items."

MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "Mark a feedback item as in-progress before starting work. Call this AFTER reading the item and BEFORE making code changes. Returns the updated item. The user's browser console reflects the change within 2 seconds. After this call you must eventually call fixthis_resolve_feedback for the same itemId."

MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "Mark a feedback item as resolved, needing clarification, or not fixed. Call this after claiming an item with fixthis_claim_feedback and finishing the work. Status must be one of resolved, needs_clarification, wont_fix."
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "Perform one debug-only navigation action against the app and optionally capture the resulting screen."

MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "Read the feedback queue as annotation JSON and Markdown. By default returns only SENT items that are not yet resolved. Pass includeAll=true to receive everything; passing itemId always returns that item regardless of state."
MaxLineLength:FixThisTools.kt$description = "Verify that expected UI text is present on the current screen through the FixThis sidekick bridge."
MaxLineLength:InstanceGroupingHelperTest.kt$InstanceGroupingHelperTest$assertTrue(result.labels.isEmpty(), "Items missing selectedNode must be excluded; remaining singletons excluded too")
MaxLineLength:InstanceGroupingHelperTest.kt$InstanceGroupingHelperTest$assertTrue(result.labels.isEmpty(), "Items missing source candidates must be excluded; remaining singletons excluded too")
